response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, leadership in open-source projects, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade GenAI solutions, direct experience with vector databases/RAG, or documented leadership in enterprise cloud AI deployments — key requirements for this staff-level role.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Strong full-stack proficiency in TypeScript/Node.js and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Demonstrated technical leadership through open-source projects and mentorship (workshops, CI/CD setup)
concerns: No explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade GenAI or RAG system development
Lacks mention of vector databases, LLM metrics, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
Minimal documentation of enterprise customer-facing technical leadership or cloud AI delivery
